title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
